name: env-example-sync
title: Sync .env.example with local env contract
description: Align committed env example and Docker wiring with supported local env contract without exposing secrets.
scope: env example and Docker env/build-arg wiring only; local .env values untouched
creator: lijin
notes:
Compared .env and .env.example by key name only. Added supported OPENCODE_API_KEY placeholder and Docker backend pass-through. Removed stale Kilo wording and documented KILO_* / FABLEMAP_DEFAULT_FREE_LLM_* as unsupported local leftovers. Added AMap VITE env placeholders and Docker build-arg wiring. docker compose config --quiet passed.
Follow-up: user requested .env.example include every local .env key name, even legacy/local-only keys, so new developers can see the full key set.
Follow-up completed: .env.example now contains every key name present in the private .env; values remain placeholders/safe defaults, and deprecated KILO_* / FABLEMAP_DEFAULT_FREE_LLM_* are visibly documented.
